properties.name: notifications.self-healing.cleanup-locks.enabled
properties.description: Whether the self-healing scheduler should clean up stale processing locks.

properties.name: notifications.worker.backpressure.enabled
properties.description: Whether backpressure monitoring is active.

properties.name: notifications.worker.backpressure.max-queue-depth
properties.description: Maximum total queue depth across all priority queues before backpressure kicks in.

properties.name: notifications.backpressure.check-interval-ms
properties.description: How often the BackpressureMonitor checks queue depth and adjusts the rate limiter (ms).

properties.name: notifications.ratelimit.enabled
properties.description: Whether API intake rate limiting via Guava RateLimiter is enabled.

properties.name: notifications.ratelimit.global-permits-per-second
properties.description: Global ingestion rate limit in requests per second.

properties.name: notifications.ratelimit.per-endpoint-permits-per-second
properties.description: Per-endpoint ingestion rate limit in requests per second.

properties.name: notifications.ratelimit.per-client-permits-per-second
properties.description: Per-client ingestion rate limit in requests per second.

properties.name: notifications.rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Whether per-type rate limiting windows are enabled.

properties.name: notifications.rate-limit.window-seconds
properties.description: Rolling window in seconds used for per-type rate limiting.

properties.name: notifications.rate-limit.payment
properties.description: Maximum notifications of type PAYMENT allowed per rate-limit window.

properties.name: notifications.rate-limit.approval
properties.description: Maximum notifications of type APPROVAL allowed per rate-limit window.

properties.name: notifications.rate-limit.system
properties.description: Maximum notifications of type SYSTEM allowed per rate-limit window.

properties.name: notifications.priority.rejection.enabled
properties.description: Whether priority-based rejection (graceful degradation) is active under load.

properties.name: notifications.priority.rejection.low-threshold-percent
properties.description: Queue fill percentage at which LOW priority requests start being rejected.

properties.name: notifications.priority.rejection.normal-threshold-percent
properties.description: Queue fill percentage at which NORMAL priority requests start being rejected. CRITICAL requests are always accepted.

properties.name: notifications.dlq.retry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the DLQ auto-retry scheduler is active.

properties.name: notifications.dlq.retry.batch-size
properties.description: Number of DLQ entries processed per retry cycle.

properties.name: notifications.dlq.retry.interval-ms
properties.description: Interval between DLQ retry cycles in milliseconds.

properties.name: notifications.dlq.retry.base-delay-seconds
properties.description: Base exponential back-off delay in seconds for DLQ retry.

properties.name: notifications.dlq.retry.max-cycles
properties.description: Maximum number of DLQ retry cycles before an entry is permanently abandoned.

properties.name: notifications.dlq.cleanup.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the DLQ cleanup job.

properties.name: notifications.outbox.retry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox periodic retry scheduler is active.

properties.name: notifications.outbox.retry.interval-ms
properties.description: Interval between outbox retry passes in milliseconds.

properties.name: notifications.outbox.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum delivery attempts before an outbox entry is moved to the DLQ.

properties.name: notifications.outbox.cleanup.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the outbox cleanup job.

properties.name: notifications.processing-lock.ttl-seconds
properties.description: TTL in seconds for a processing lock held by a worker thread.

properties.name: notifications.processing-lock.cleanup-age-seconds
properties.description: Age in seconds after which an unreleased processing lock is cleaned up.

properties.name: notifications.push-circuit.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Firebase push circuit breaker is active.

properties.name: notifications.push-circuit.failure-rate-threshold
properties.description: Failure rate (0.0–1.0) above which the push circuit trips to OPEN.

properties.name: notifications.push-circuit.min-samples
properties.description: Minimum number of samples required before the circuit evaluates the failure rate.

properties.name: notifications.push-circuit.cooldown-seconds
properties.description: Seconds to wait in OPEN state before transitioning to HALF-OPEN.

properties.name: notifications.push-circuit.window-seconds
properties.description: Sliding window in seconds used to calculate the failure rate.

properties.name: notifications.alert.dlq-size-threshold
properties.description: DLQ size above which an alert is fired.

properties.name: notifications.alert.queue-delay-threshold-seconds
properties.description: Queue age in seconds above which a delay alert is fired.

properties.name: notifications.alert.push-failure-rate-threshold
properties.description: Push failure rate above which an alert is fired.

properties.name: notifications.alert.sla-failed-threshold
properties.description: Number of SLA-failed notifications that triggers an alert.

properties.name: notifications.metrics.collection-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between queue metrics collection passes.

properties.name: notifications.alerting.check-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between hard-limit alerting checks.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-queue-size
properties.description: Hard limit on the total queue size across all priorities. Ingestion returns 429 when exceeded.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-queue-size-critical
properties.description: Hard limit on the CRITICAL priority queue size.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-queue-size-normal
properties.description: Hard limit on the NORMAL priority queue size.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-queue-size-low
properties.description: Hard limit on the LOW priority queue size.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-queue-age-seconds
properties.description: Maximum age in seconds a notification may sit in the queue before an alert is raised.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-queue-age-critical-seconds
properties.description: Maximum age in seconds a CRITICAL notification may sit in the queue before an alert is raised.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-dlq-size
properties.description: DLQ size at which throttling begins.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-dlq-size-hard-stop
properties.description: DLQ size at which ingestion hard-stops.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-ingestion-rate
properties.description: Maximum sustained ingestion rate in requests per second.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-burst-rate
properties.description: Maximum burst ingestion rate in requests per second.

properties.name: notifications.system.min-processing-rate
properties.description: Minimum expected processing rate in notifications per second. Triggers an alert when below this.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-inflight
properties.description: Maximum number of notifications being actively processed at once.

properties.name: notifications.system.max-inflight-hard-stop
properties.description: In-flight count at which ingestion hard-stops.

properties.name: notifications.system.backpressure-threshold-percent
properties.description: Queue fill percentage (of max) at which backpressure begins.

properties.name: notifications.system.ingestion-pause-threshold-percent
properties.description: Queue fill percentage (of max) at which ingestion is paused.

properties.name: notifications.simple-mode
properties.description: Enables simple (non-queued) notification delivery mode.

properties.name: notifications.simple-mode.push
properties.description: Enables simple push delivery within simple mode.

properties.name: notification.worker.enabled
properties.description: Whether the async notification worker is active.

properties.name: notification.worker.critical-threads
properties.description: Core thread pool size for CRITICAL priority notifications.

properties.name: notification.worker.normal-threads
properties.description: Core thread pool size for NORMAL priority notifications.

properties.name: notification.worker.low-threads
properties.description: Core thread pool size for LOW priority notifications.

properties.name: notification.worker.max-inflight
properties.description: Maximum in-flight notifications across all worker pools.

properties.name: notification.worker.queue-capacity
properties.description: Bounded queue capacity per worker executor.

properties.name: notification.worker.poll-timeout-ms
properties.description: Redis queue poll timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: notification.worker.scale.max-critical
properties.description: Maximum thread pool size for CRITICAL priority notifications under load.

properties.name: notification.worker.scale.max-normal
properties.description: Maximum thread pool size for NORMAL priority notifications under load.

properties.name: notification.queue.critical
properties.description: Redis key for the CRITICAL priority notification queue.

properties.name: notification.queue.normal
properties.description: Redis key for the NORMAL priority notification queue.

properties.name: notification.queue.low
properties.description: Redis key for the LOW priority notification queue.

properties.name: notification.dlq
properties.description: Redis key for the Dead-Letter Queue.

properties.name: notification.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum delivery attempts before a notification is sent to the DLQ.

properties.name: notification.dedup.ttl-seconds
properties.description: TTL in seconds for deduplication keys stored in Redis.

properties.name: monitoring.alert.enabled
properties.description: Whether active monitoring and alerting is enabled.

properties.name: monitoring.alert.success-rate-threshold
properties.description: Minimum acceptable push success rate (%). Alerts fire below this value.

properties.name: monitoring.alert.dlq-size-threshold
properties.description: DLQ size above which the active monitor fires an alert.

properties.name: monitoring.check.interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between active monitoring check cycles.

properties.name: alerting.enabled
properties.description: Whether Slack alerting is enabled.

properties.name: alerting.slack.webhook-url
properties.description: Slack incoming webhook URL for alert delivery.

properties.name: firebase.enabled
properties.description: Whether Firebase Cloud Messaging is enabled. Set to false for local development.

properties.name: firebase.service-account-key-path
properties.description: Classpath or file-system path to the Firebase service-account JSON credential.

properties.name: internal.api.keys
properties.description: Comma-separated list of valid internal API keys used by the X-API-Key header filter.

properties.name: internal.api.header
properties.description: HTTP header name used for internal API key authentication.

properties.name: internal.api.excluded-paths
properties.description: Comma-separated list of Ant-style path patterns excluded from internal API key validation.

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: cors.allowed-methods
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS HTTP methods.

properties.name: cors.allowed-headers
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS headers.

properties.name: cors.allow-credentials
properties.description: Whether CORS requests with credentials are allowed.

properties.name: cors.max-age
properties.description: CORS preflight cache duration in seconds.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC-SHA secret used to sign and verify JWT tokens. Must be at least 64 characters in production.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: arpay.backend.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Arpay backend service used for cross-service calls.

properties.name: management.endpoint.health.probes.enabled
properties.description: Whether Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness health probes are enabled.

properties.name: management.endpoint.health.group.liveness.include
properties.description: Comma-separated list of health indicators included in the liveness probe group.

properties.name: management.endpoint.health.group.readiness.include
properties.description: Comma-separated list of health indicators included in the readiness probe group.
